reviews.comment:
No me gustó el lugar. No obtuve ningún descuento por socio del Aca y ni siquiera pude dar aire a las ruedas,ya que no funciona.

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like the place. I didn't get any Aca member discount, and I couldn't even pump air into my tires because it didn't work.

We had to travel to Asuncion and they didn't sell Super, only Premium.

reviews.comment:
Mala experiencia... llegamos y no había combustible.. a lo que la persona que atendía nos respondió que no sabia hasta cuando de mala manera. Los baños un desastre... un olor insoportable.. los inodoros marrones de la suciedad.. sin papel higiénico. Pésima experiencia.

(Translated by Google)
Bad experience... we arrived and there was no fuel. The person serving us rudely replied that he didn't know for how long. The bathrooms were a disaster... an unbearable smell... the toilets were brown from filth... no toilet paper. Terrible experience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeU9uaUh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Malo. Mucha cola.  No esta organizado.  Los servicios no funcionan.

(Translated by Google)
Bad. Long lines. It's not organized. The restrooms aren't working.

reviews.comment:
No tienen empleados para expendio, se demora mucho,  pésimo servicio,   casi siempre está desabastecido

(Translated by Google)
They don't have employees for sales, it takes a long time, terrible service, it's almost always out of stock
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbWJqWnpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre, vivo en Paraguay,  soy Argentina y por la chapa de mi vehículo, me querían cargar 10 litros de nafta a 350 por litro, cuando el litro a valor real es de hoy 175, ahí se exhibía ese valor.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disaster. I live in Paraguay, I'm Argentinian, and because of my vehicle's license plate, they wanted to charge me 350 pesos per liter for 10 liters of gasoline, when the real price per liter today is 175 pesos, and that's the price that was displayed there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNmRQUzhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es de cuarta le hackearon el sistema y habia colas y colas para cargar combustible,  solo 1 playero. El servicompra no tiene nada para comer mas que chipá y duros.

(Translated by Google)
It's a terrible gas station; their system was hacked, and there were endless lines to get fuel, with only one attendant. The convenience store only has chipá and hardtack to eat.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNmQ2c2RBEAE
